errors.invalidCredentials: Unable to sign in. Check your credentials.

success.registered: Account created. Sign in to continue.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Register to enter the arena with your own profile.
register.passwordHint: Use at least 8 characters, 1 uppercase letter and 1 number.

errors.usernameLength: Username must be between 3 and 30 characters.
errors.usernameInvalid: Use only letters, numbers, dot, underscore, or hyphen.
errors.passwordWeak: Password must have 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one number.
errors.default: Unable to create your account right now.

header.subtitle: Your next challenge is ready. Check your progress and jump back into the arena.

daily.title: Daily challenge
daily.empty: No daily challenge is available right now.

actions.playHint: This button is already in place for the next step: starting a session with the backend.

errors.loadFailed: Unable to load your home data right now.

profileScreen.subtitle: See your main account details and manage your session.
profileScreen.progressSubtitle: Your performance and current competitive standing.
profileScreen.personalInfoSubtitle: Basic data associated with your profile.
profileScreen.settingsSubtitle: Access language, security, and app preferences.
profileScreen.error: Unable to load your profile right now.

settingsScreen.title: Settings
settingsScreen.subtitle: Manage app preferences and account options.
settingsScreen.languageHelp: Choose the main interface language. The change is stored on the device.
settingsScreen.notificationsHelp: This area can centralize push alerts, emails, and reminder preferences.
settingsScreen.securityHelp: Sensitive account actions belong here, such as changing password and reviewing active sessions.

general.title: Open settings
general.description: See all account and app preferences.

language.title: Language
language.description: Change the language shown in the app.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Define how and when the app can notify you.

security.title: Security
security.description: Change password, review sessions, and other sensitive actions.

placeholders.pushDescription: Place device permission controls and notification categories here.
placeholders.emailDescription: Use this section for transactional emails, product updates, and reminders.
placeholders.passwordDescription: This screen is the right place to connect a password update flow to the backend.
placeholders.sessionsDescription: You can list connected devices here and offer remote sign-out.

leaderboardScreen.title: Global ranking
leaderboardScreen.subtitle: Track who is leading the competition.
leaderboardScreen.error: Unable to load the ranking right now.

statsScreen.title: Your stats
statsScreen.subtitle: A quick view of your current performance.
